normalization.notes: Store Cherokee text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Treat Cherokee Supplement lowercase as case data rather than as separate learner-visible content until reviewer policy is set.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Cherokee syllabograms, vowel-series groupings, syllable families, and case variants
segmentation.notes: Cherokee is encoded as syllabary characters rather than alphabetic segments. Early lessons should teach high-payoff syllabograms and recurring series without implying one-to-one Latin spelling.
